response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (37%) is below our minimum sharing threshold (65%), and with 90 min to depletion in islanded critical state, we must preserve reserves for our own load—geographic circle requests cannot override local survival constraints.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.65, distrusted_peers=['r2c2'].
Your latest belief: Islanded critical state; SoC 37% with 1 kW load → ~90 min to depletion. Neighborhood uniformly stressed (35–49% SoC). r2c2 repeatedly rejected with 0.7 threshold; all peers requesting. Zero outbound sharing until SoC ≥ 65%. Accepting all inbound offers. Geographic fallback active; deprioritize r2c2 due to consistent rejection pattern..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
